name: ohmycaptcha
description: ⚡ Self-hostable YesCaptcha-compatible captcha solver built with FastAPI, Playwright, and OpenAI-compatible multimodal models.
readme_summary: OhMyCaptcha is a self-hostable, YesCaptcha-compatible API service that automates solving various CAPTCHA challenges. It leverages Playwright for browser-based challenges like reCAPTCHA and hCaptcha, and multimodal/vision models for image-based classification tasks, offering a flexible solution for integrating automated CAPTCHA solving into other applications.
key_features: Supports 19 task types including reCAPTCHA v2/v3, hCaptcha, Cloudflare Turnstile
Image recognition and classification using local multimodal and vision models
Easy deployment options (Render, Hugging Face Spaces, Docker)
primary_use_case: To provide a self-hosted, automated CAPTCHA solving service with a YesCaptcha-compatible API, enabling integration into applications like flow2api or other systems requiring automated CAPTCHA resolution.
cover_image_prompt: A digital alchemist in a high-tech laboratory, holding a glowing orb representing a complex CAPTCHA puzzle. With a focused expression, the alchemist uses a futuristic wand that projects streams of code and data, transforming the chaotic orb into a simple, clear checkmark. Around the alchemist, subtle screens display Playwright browser windows and AI model interfaces. The laboratory is filled with glowing circuits and data streams, emphasizing the automated and intelligent nature of the process. The overall mood is one of sophisticated problem-solving and seamless automation. Style: 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and vibrant, glowing accents.

name: NoctaVox
readme_summary: NoctaVox is a lightweight, terminal-based music player written in Rust, offering gapless playback, queue support, and various audio visualizations. It provides a customizable TUI experience with Vim-like keybindings and live theme reloading for local audio files.
key_features: Multi-format audio (mp3, m4a, wav, flac, ogg, opus)
primary_use_case: A terminal user interface (TUI) for playing local music files with advanced features like gapless playback and visualizations.
cover_image_prompt: A minimalist, glowing sound wave emanating from a stylized terminal window, transforming into vibrant, abstract musical notes and patterns. The terminal itself has subtle, glowing UI elements and a single, clear cursor. The background is a dark, cosmic void, with faint constellations representing audio files. Small, ethereal particles of light drift around the scene, symbolizing the audio data being processed. The overall mood is serene and futuristic, highlighting the seamless audio experience. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a dark, vibrant color palette and a focus on glowing, ethereal effects.

name: ente
readme_summary: Ente provides a fully open-source, end-to-end encrypted cloud platform for storing photos, documents, and credentials, along with a 2FA authenticator app. It prioritizes user privacy by ensuring data is encrypted before it leaves the user's device, meaning even Ente cannot access it. The service offers multiple client applications across various platforms and is externally audited for security.
key_features: End-to-end encryption for all stored data
Ente Photos: Google/Apple Photos alternative with features like face detection, semantic search, private sharing, collaborative albums
Ente Locker: Secure storage for documents and credentials
Ente Auth: Open-source, end-to-end encrypted 2FA authenticator
External security audits by reputable firms
primary_use_case: Providing a secure, private, and open-source cloud storage solution with end-to-end encryption for personal data like photos and documents, and a secure authenticator app.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, transparent vault door made of glowing digital light, with a single, secure keyhole at its center. Inside the vault, instead of gold, are vibrant, organized digital representations of photos, documents, and security tokens. A gentle stream of data particles flows from a user's device (represented by a minimalist smartphone icon) towards the vault, passing through a subtle encryption filter that makes them glow with a protective aura before entering. The Ente logo is subtly integrated into the vault's design. The overall mood is secure, private, and modern, with a clean, minimalist aesthetic and a cool blue and green color palette. Style: 3D isometric illustration with soft lighting and clear, defined shapes.

name: AutoGPT
description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
readme_summary: AutoGPT is a platform for creating, deploying, and managing continuous AI agents that automate complex workflows. It offers both self-hosting and a cloud-hosted beta, empowering users to build custom agents or use pre-configured ones through an intuitive interface.
key_features: Create, deploy, and manage continuous AI agents
Workflow Management with block-based action connections
Deployment controls for agent lifecycle management
primary_use_case: Automating complex workflows by building, deploying, and managing AI agents.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman in a futuristic workshop, meticulously assembling intricate clockwork robots from glowing blueprints. Each robot is a different specialized agent, receiving raw data (represented by flowing streams of abstract shapes) and transforming it into completed tasks (depicted as organized, finished products on conveyor belts). Subtle UI elements showing agent configurations and workflow diagrams are visible on holographic screens around the workshop. The scene is bathed in a warm, inviting light, emphasizing creation and automation. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a focus on detail, clearly showcasing the process of building and deploying AI agents.

name: quickemu
description: Quickly create and run optimised Windows, macOS and Linux virtual machines
readme_summary: Quickemu is a shell script wrapper for QEMU that simplifies the creation and management of virtual machines for Windows, macOS, Linux, and other operating systems. It automates optimal hardware configuration and OS downloads, making virtualization accessible without complex setup.
key_features: Automated OS downloads and configuration via quickget
Optimized VM configuration based on host hardware
Support for Windows (including TPM 2.0), macOS, Linux, BSDs, and more
Full SPICE and VirtIO-webdavd/9p file sharing
EFI and Legacy BIOS boot support
primary_use_case: To quickly and easily create and run optimized virtual machines for various operating systems, including Windows and macOS, on Linux and macOS hosts.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic robot assistant holding a magic wand, effortlessly assembling a complex, multi-layered digital castle representing a virtual machine. On one side, digital streams of code and operating system logos (Windows, macOS, Linux Tux) flow into the robot's wand. On the other side, the completed, glowing virtual machine castle stands tall, with small, stylized windows showing different OS interfaces. Subtle UI elements and data particles surround the scene, with the 'Quickemu' name subtly etched on the robot's chest. The overall mood is one of effortless creation and technological magic. Rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style with a bright, inviting color palette.
